name: Hitei
description: A mysterious and seemingly cruel girl who appears to know more than she lets on, Princess Hitei is Togame's archrival and constantly schemes to interfere with Togame's mission. ~!She's a descendant of Shikizaki Kiki, and possesses the last of the Twelve Deviant Blades, a pair of pistols called Entou Jyuu, which she entrusts to Emonzaemon. name: Keiji Togashi
description: __Height:__ 187 cm Togashi is a first year high school student and member of Tokyo City Esperion FC Youth. He is a hot-headed and passionate kid who came to Esperion after leaving his motorcycle gang behind. His dark black hair is regularly styled in a classic biker-yankee pompadour.

name: Kivye
description: Kivye is the envoy of the Goddess of Darkness Kivryelle. She was sent to Rathnia to search for Ryu Han-Bin in order to ask for his help in finding one of the four heroes, Barolt, for the sake of saving the world of Rathnia from Ormphlaus and defeating Zenovia and Garhan.

name: Love Momozono
description: **Height:** 159cm Love Momozono is the group leader of Fresh! Precure. She is a second-year student at Public Yotsuba Junior High School. Her alter ego is Cure Peach. Love is a hyperactive and emotional young girl who passionately tries her best to ensure everyone can be happy through the simplest of means. name: Lynne
description: The First Princess of the Kingdom of Clays, her full name is Linneburg Clays. She excels in every conceivable ability, having graduated from the Royal Capital Training Academy with the highest scores in its history across all disciplines. She has comprehensively mastered skills spanning all six elemental systems. name: Margaret
description: A mysterious woman replacing Elizabeth as Igor's assistant after Elizabeth set off on a journey. After establishing the Social Link with her, she requests the Protagonist to create a certain Persona with a certain skill from fusion, as a euphemism for drawing out those aspects of the protagonists personality. name: Midori Kasugano
description: A 16-year-old-girl who ends up as Seiji's right hand. She has had a crush on him for three years. One day she wishes to be with him so much that she finds herself, in miniature form, in the place of his right hand. This causes problems for him, since it is the "Devil's right-hand" he punches with. ~!Midori's real body is in a coma, and her mother tries everything to bring her back. name: Miyako Gotokuji
description: She transforms using the phrase "Rolling Bubbles" and uses a bubble wand as a weapon. In comparison to the original Bubbles, who was known for being the most childish of the girls, Miyako is the ditsiest member of the three, often appearing a bit clueless, and doesn't seem to understand her powers completely, along with a few other things. name: Nina Tucker
description: __Nationality:__ Amestrian Nina's father was Shou Tucker, the Sowing Life Alchemist. ~! When her father became desperate in forming another talking chimera he transmuted her and her dog into a chimera that was able to speak the human language. Shortly after, she is killed by Scar to put her out of her misery. Later on in the first anime, with the philosopher's stone, the disfigured Chimeric Shou Tucker is able to resurrect his fallen daughter into the form of a chimera homunculus, an artificial

name: Noa Fukushima
description: **Position:** Vocals/Performer Noa is a member of **[Photon Maiden](https://anilist.co/staff/263434/Photon-Maiden)**. Noa became interested in theater plays through her love of literature, and decided to become a performer when she was praised at a theater workshop. Very curious and full of knowledge, she becomes talkative when it comes to things she's interested in. She loves cute things. (Source: D4DJ Fandom)

name: Nyaan
description: A courier who smuggles illegal goods. When Nyaan's homeland was turned into a battlefield and she became a refugee, she escaped her colony alone in a petit mobile suit, with no time to even check on the safety of her family. Luckily, she was picked up by a ship and brought to a colony that Machu lives. Her highest priority is her own survival.

name: Osushi
description: __Race:__ Dragon __Type:__ Disguiser/Dark Dragon __Owner:__ [Balgo Parks](https://anilist.co/character/185999/Balgo-Ywain-Parks) A Dragon masquerading as Balgo Parks's pet dog in London. In his dog form, Osushi is a small Pomeranian with light-colored fur and dark paws. In his Dark Dragon form, Osushi is a large, black dragon with a light underbelly, four thick legs and two enormous wings. He is heavily scaled and possesses many sharp teeth.

name: Pico
description: Captain of the pirate guild in Planet. A very arrogant girl who enjoys acting on her whims and prioritizes having fun above all else, often griefing and generally being a nuisance in-game, with her crew consisting of likeminded people who play the game to mess with others. At times, she tends to casually make wordplays that integrate her name into random words. name: Rekka Hoshimiya
description: A Third Generation pyrotechnic, Lieutenant of Special Fire Force Company 1, and priest of the Holy Sol Temple. He is an eccentric and enthusiastic man. Always confident and expressive in his speech. ~!He is one of several people using “insects” to turn people into infernals.!~

name: Rihoko Sakurai
description: __Height:__ 164 cm She is Junichi's childhood friend who, despite having a big appetite, avidly reads the dieting books in their school library. She is a member of the Tea-Making Society. Riihoko's arc is the 5th in the Anime.
